description:
Offered: annually
Introduction to basic concepts and applications of geographic information systems (GIS). Lab exercises on PC-based GIS packages.
Prerequisite(s): CSC 1100 or GEOG 2400 or GEOG 3120 or GEOG 3300
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, PL
prerequisites: CSC 1100 or GEOG 2400 or GEOG 3120 or GEOG 3300
